Motion For In Camera Review Of Mental Health Practitioner Certificate Of Merit, Attorney Certificate Of Merit, And Attorney Certificate Of Corroborative Fact
Off Calendar Jul-28-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: M. ROE's Motion For In Camera Review Of Mental Health Practitioner Certificate Of Merit, Attorney Certificate Of Merit, And Attorney Certificate Of Corroborative Fact.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel, or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: M. Roe's motion for in camera review is granted.

Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/CK)

Motion For In Camera Review Of Mental Health Practitioner Certificate Of Merit, Attorney Certificate Of Merit, And Attorney Certificate Of Corroborative Fact
Off Calendar May-24-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Vaheh Manoukian, Esq. 415-675-1089 The Matiasic Firm for Plaintiff.
No other Apperance.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. The Court shares its views without disclosing its contents on the psychologist's declaration. Counsel confirms there is a typo on the declaration. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF M. ROE'S Motion For In Camera Review Of Mental Health Practitioner Certificate Of Merit, Attorney Certificate Of Merit, And Attorney Certificate Of Corroborative Fact.

Off calendar, Counsel to submit the correct declaration. The Court instructs counsel to call the clerk in Dept. 302 at 415-551-3723 to set up a new court date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RBU)
